creator: groot@kde.org
text:
Created attachment 169983
patch against ports svn; use -p4

This comes from area51, the kde-freebsd staging area. Original port by aschai, maintained by tcberner and rakuco.

From the pkg-descr:


Simon is an open source speech recognition program that can replace your
mouse and keyboard. The system is designed to be as flexible as possible
and will work with any language or dialect.


Use patch -p4 for the first attachment, since it's got full pathnames in it.
